title: ARM - 04/10
html:
TRADE ID: 202604100943
ARM - 04/10
Fading the rally in ARM

The market just pushed ai stocks higher extremely fast. ARM also rallied and into prior fail where I had in recent history sold calls in it (shorted it successfully). Today I repeated this process with the same trade: Sell Dec call, which leaves room for error

ARM fundamentals are great, and this is only a battle against resistance. I would not short this stock unless I have a good account that is able to handle the heat.

Trade Alert: ARM (Bearish / Neutral) Note: Skip these setups if you are already short ARM.

+ Setup: Sell to open the Dec 18th 270 Call for a 5.9. Requires roughly 1480 in margin to hold. Note: IT IS DANGEROUS TO SELL NAKED CALLS. EARNINGS REPORT IS IN ABOUT 25 DAYS.

* Selling naked calls carries unlimited risk and should not be taken lightly.

Nic
